common.tagline: Find it. Book it. Drive it.
common.metaTitle: MOWSIL — Find it. Book it. Drive it.
common.metaDescription: The first trusted car rental aggregator in Oujda — transparent, local, instant.

home.heroTitle:
Find the car
you need in Oujda
home.heroSubtitle: Compare, book and drive. Transparent pricing, verified agencies, instant booking.
home.heroNote: No online payment. You pay directly at the agency.
home.step1Desc: Browse available vehicles in Oujda. Filter by type, price and dates.
home.step2Desc: Submit your request. The agency confirms within 2 hours.
home.step3Desc: Present your pickup code at the agency, pay on site and hit the road.
home.whyTransparentDesc: Displayed price = price paid. No surprises.
home.whyTrustedDesc: Agencies physically audited by our team.
home.whyLocalDesc: Human support via WhatsApp, response within 2 hours.
home.whySimpleDesc: 3 clicks, zero paperwork. Book from your phone.
home.ctaDesc: Join the drivers who trust us in Oujda.
home.footerTagline: The first trusted car rental aggregator in Oujda.

sections.title: Publisher

cgu.title: Terms of Service
cgu.intro: These terms and conditions govern the use of the MOWSIL platform. By using our services, you accept these terms.

sections.title: Article 1 — Purpose
sections.body: These Terms of Service (hereinafter 'ToS') govern access to and use of the MOWSIL platform (the 'Service'), accessible from the mowsil.ma website and its mobile applications. By using the Service, you unreservedly accept these ToS.

sections.title: Article 2 — Definitions
sections.body: 'Platform': the MOWSIL website and mobile application. 'User': any individual using the Platform to search for or book a vehicle. 'Agency': any vehicle rental professional registered on the Platform. 'Vehicle': any vehicle offered for rent by an Agency through the Platform. 'Booking': a vehicle rental request made by a User from an Agency through the Platform.

sections.title: Article 3 — Role of MOWSIL
sections.body: MOWSIL acts as a technical intermediary between Users and Agencies. MOWSIL is not a vehicle rental company and does not intervene in the rental contract concluded directly between the User and the Agency. MOWSIL provides a platform for matching, booking and tracking, without being a party to the rental contract. Consequently, MOWSIL cannot be held responsible for the vehicles offered, their condition, their availability, or the execution of the rental contract by the Agency.

sections.title: Article 4 — Responsibilities
sections.body: Legal liability relating to the vehicle rental lies exclusively with the Agency and the User. The Agency is solely responsible for the compliance of the vehicles offered, their maintenance, their insurance, and the validation of required documents. The User is solely responsible for the use they make of the rented vehicle, compliance with traffic laws, and any damage caused to the vehicle. MOWSIL cannot be held liable for disputes arising between an Agency and a User.

sections.title: Article 5 — Personal Data
sections.body: As part of using the Platform, MOWSIL collects the following data: first name, last name, phone number, email address, and driving license number. This data is collected exclusively for booking management and communication between the User and the Agency. The legal basis for processing is the execution of the booking contract and User consent. Data is retained for a maximum of one (1) year from the last booking, after which it is automatically purged. In accordance with Moroccan law 09-08 on the protection of personal data, the User has a right to access, rectify and delete their data. To exercise this right, the User may send an email to support@mowsil.ma with the subject 'Right to deletion'. The request will be processed within 30 days.

sections.title: Article 6 — Duration and validity
sections.body: These ToS take effect upon acceptance by the User and remain valid for the entire duration of Service use. MOWSIL reserves the right to modify the ToS at any time. Users will be informed of any material changes by email or via the Platform.

sections.title: 1. Data collected
sections.body: We collect the following data when using the Platform: first name, last name, email address, phone number, driving license number, and information relating to your bookings (dates, chosen vehicle, agency). This data is provided directly by you when creating your account and making bookings.

sections.title: 2. Purposes of processing
sections.body: Your data is processed for the following purposes: (a) management and tracking of your bookings; (b) communication with the Agency regarding your booking; (c) sending notifications relating to the status of your booking; (d) improvement of the Platform; (e) compliance with our legal obligations.

sections.title: 3. Legal basis
sections.body: Processing of your data is based on: (a) performance of the booking contract (contractual obligation); (b) your explicit consent when creating your account and validating your bookings; (c) MOWSIL's legitimate interest in improving its services.

sections.title: 4. Data recipients
sections.body: Your data is transmitted exclusively to the Agency with which you make a booking, and only for the purpose of managing your rental. We do not share your data with third parties for commercial purposes. Our technical subcontractors (hosting provider, email service) may have access to your data strictly for the purpose of providing their services.

sections.title: 5. Retention period
sections.body: Your personal data is retained for a maximum of one (1) year from your last booking. After this period, it is automatically deleted from our active databases. Data necessary for compliance with our legal obligations (accounting, tax) may be retained for the legally required period.

sections.title: 6. Right to deletion
sections.body: In accordance with Law 09-08, you have the right to delete your personal data ('right to deletion'). To exercise this right, send an email to support@mowsil.ma with the subject 'Right to deletion' stating your name and email address. We will process your request within a maximum of 30 days. After this period, all your personal data will be permanently deleted.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.body: For any questions regarding this privacy policy or to exercise your rights, you can contact us at support@mowsil.ma. You can also write to us at the following address: MOWSIL SARL, Oujda, Morocco.
